title: That pain-in-the-ass "Mercury"
content:
A quote from "CNN":http://www.cnn.com/2005/WORLD/asiapcf/11/21/thai.pm.ap/index.html ...

bq.. Thai Prime Minister Thaksin Shinawatra has said he will not answer reporters' questions until next year because the alignment of the planets is not in his favor.

"Right now Mercury ... is in a corner perfectly aligned with my star. Mercury is no good, so if it's not good, I am going to request not to speak. I'll just wait until next year to talk," Thaksin told reporters Sunday after returning to Bangkok from a trip to South Korea and China.

p. Ouch, those damn reporters! ... ;)

Got this link from a conversation with a friend earlier today. The conversation went like this.

bq.. Friend: Hey man, where are you from again? Thailand or Taiwan?
Me: --" ... What kind of question is this? Thailand, dude!
Friend: Um .. did your Prime M really say this [above link]?
Me: Unfortunately, yes. :'(
Friend: Damn! Shit brain!!

p. And I was ROFLOL(rolling on the floor laughing out loud).
